title: Things like _______, mobile video ads, custom creative take over your screen for a second.
tip: “overlay”意为“覆盖”，符合广告覆盖屏幕的语境。

title: Mobile technology can _______ professors' teaching tool-kit.
tip: “upgrade”表示升级，符合移动技术提升教学工具的语境。

title: Engineers and operations staff investigated the failure, which was later diagnosed as a fault with a _______.
tip: “transformer”（变压器）是电力系统常见设备，符合故障语境。

title: Over the past five years, our company has pioneered an _______ technology solution aimed at making electric cars more affordable and more convenient than gasoline cars.
tip: “innovative”（创新的）与“pioneered”呼应，符合语境。

title: Youngsters were asked to _______ subjects on a list including family, job, music and friends.
tip: “prioritize”意为“排序优先级”，符合语境。

title: China had planned to _______ its nuclear submarines at an international fleet review marking the 60th anniversary of its navy, official media reported yesterday.
tip: “unveil”意为“首次公开展示”，符合国际阅舰式语境。

title: As many as 67% of Chinese consumers are likely to buy _______ fitness monitors and 73% wants smart watches in the coming five years.
tip: “wearable”（可穿戴的）是智能设备常见描述词。

title: The Congressional Budget Office calculates that the deficit could rise to 23% of GDP in the next 40 years if it fails to tackle the yawning imbalance between revenue and _______.
tip: “expenditure”（支出）与“revenue”（收入）构成财政收支对比。

title: Good hygiene helps to _______ the risk of infection.
tip: “minimize”意为“最小化”，符合卫生降低感染风险的常识。

title: We had _______ few application for the job.
tip: “relatively few”意为“相对较少”，语法和语义均通顺。

title: The _______ of computers as an educational tool is obvious.
tip: “effectiveness”（有效性）符合“obvious”正面语境。

title: In the future, the _______ travel outside our solar system will probably be conducted by robots.
tip: “interplanetary”（行星间的）修饰太阳系外旅行，准确。

title: If you say that someone or something is a _______, you mean that they cause a lot of problems or embarrassment.
tip: “liability”有“负担、麻烦”之意，符合定义。

title: The refugees were groping their way through the dark, trying to reach _______.
tip: 难民在黑暗中摸索寻求“safety”（安全），符合常理。

title: It calls for the _______ of all commercial lending institutions from the college loan program.
tip: “exclusion”（排除）符合“calls for”后接政策建议的语境。

title: The problem of _______ need of food should be solved by all governments.
tip: “increased need”表示“增长的需求”，语义通顺。

title: If even one-third of this capacity were built, it would have a _______ impact on global LNG prices.
tip: “significant impact”（显著影响）是固定搭配。

title: By the end of 2013, they had applied for export permits for more than 380 bcma— _______ to all of the world’s current liquefaction capacity.
tip: “equivalent to”表示“相当于”，符合句意。

title: This is in marked _______ to annual growth of 2.7 percent over the previous 15 years.
tip: “in marked contrast to”是固定搭配，意为“与…形成鲜明对比”。

title: The influence of these three disruptions is not likely to _______ before the turn of the decade.
tip: “wane”意为“减弱”，符合“影响不会减弱”的语境。

title: The shale-gas _______ in the United States, rapidly increasing Asian demand, and the European economic crisis have driven huge price discrepancies among regional markets.
tip: “shale-gas boom”（页岩气繁荣）是常见经济术语。

title: As the _______ market becomes saturated, firms begin to export the product.
tip: “domestic market”（国内市场）饱和后转向出口，逻辑合理。

title: The extreme growth of investment during the financial crisis has added to the problem of _______.
tip: 投资过度导致“oversupply”（供过于求），符合经济常识。

title: It is important for a politician to be _______ in the face of hostility.
tip: “prudent”（谨慎的）是政治家应有的品质。

title: The rail strike is causing major _______ at the country's ports.
tip: 罢工导致“disruptions”（中断、混乱），符合逻辑。

title: His _______ suggests that the development of this country will last at least twenty years.
tip: “analysis”（分析）可引出对发展时间的预测。

title: The government should focus on how to prevent the _______ crisis.
tip: “economic crisis”（经济危机）是固定搭配。

title: _______, the less you have to do the more you may resent the work that does come your way.
tip: “Paradoxically”（自相矛盾地）符合前后逻辑矛盾的语境。

title: On the other hand, job profiles will improve as robots _______ dangerous, dull and dirty jobs not only in the manufacturing industrie.
tip: “take over”意为“接管”，符合机器人替代人工的语境。

title: Wrong may be done either by the robot itself or by society when applying robotic devices. For example, robotic companions can attain a very high level of social _______.
tip: “pervasiveness”（普遍性）指社交渗透程度高，符合语境。

title: In addition, the technologies will enable a wide range of Earth-based exploration and material processing activities from automated undersea inspection to mining and mineral extraction under _______ condition.
tip: “hazardous condition”（危险条件）符合采矿等作业环境。

title: Robotic technologies will enable a broad range of innovations resulting, for example, in more _______ transport systems and intelligent household appliances.
tip: “flexible”（灵活的）是智能交通系统的理想特性。

title: Furthermore, robot-based production increases product quality, improves work conditions and lead to an _______ use of resources.
tip: “optimized use”（优化利用）符合机器人提高效率的语境。

title: Robots are known to save costs, to improve quality and work conditions, and to _______ waste of resources.
tip: “minimize waste”（最小化浪费）是常见环保表述。

title: They hoped the waiting and the _______ would make me retreat.
tip: “uncertainty”（不确定性）与“waiting”共同施加心理压力。

title: They say better planning is needed to assess the environmental costs and benefits of planting trees to _______ climate change.
tip: “mitigate”意为“缓解”，常用于“缓解气候变化”（mitigate climate change）。

title: Lacking an outlet, the Caspian Sea loses water only by evaporation, leading to the _______ of salt.
tip: 水分蒸发后盐分“accumulation”（积累）符合地理常识。

title: However, this position can mean you are forcing your body into a position that can _______ existing aches and strains in the joints and muscles.
tip: “exacerbate”意为“加剧”，符合动作加重已有疼痛的语境。

title: Your spouse is the one person that you should be able to trust over all others, so when they hurt you badly, and then do so again, it's more _______ than nearly any other pain.
tip: “devastating”（毁灭性的）形容被最信任之人伤害的痛苦。

title: He lost much of his right arm and suffered _______ injuries, including severe traumatic brain injury.
tip: “multiple injuries”（多处伤）是常见医学表达。

title: We believe the reduction should be easily _______ by the unexpected increase in investment growth, he said.
tip: “offset”意为“抵消”，投资增长可抵消减少的影响。

title: Many of its glaciers are steadfastly retreating due to rising temperatures and declining _______.
tip: 冰川退缩与“precipitation”（降水量）减少直接相关。

title: They now have a health system strengthening fund that is starting to invest _______ amount of money.
tip: “considerable amount”（可观的金额）是固定搭配。

title: Currently, induction-loop systems and hearing aids can be used to improve the volume of _______ sounds, but cannot target and amplify specific sounds effectively.
tip: “ambient sounds”指环境声音，符合助听设备应用场景。

title: Higher CO2 lets plants in greenhouses cut water losses because they can take in enough of the gas without opening their _______ as widely.
tip: “stomata”（气孔）是植物吸收CO2和水分蒸腾的通道。

title: It has not been revealed if Samsung plans to make the _______ synthesis process public, a move that would rapidly accelerate the adoption of graphene into daily use.
tip: “groundbreaking”（开创性的）形容石墨烯合成工艺的突破性。

title: We expect this discovery to _______ the commercialization of graphene, which could unlock the next era of consumer electronic technology.
tip: “accelerate commercialization”（加速商业化）符合积极语境。

title: Previously, small graphene particles had been combined to form large-area graphene, but the process _______ both the mechanic and electric effectiveness of the substance.
tip: “diminished”（削弱）指工艺降低了石墨烯性能。

title: If this _______ can be overcome, however, graphene could be used in a huge range of devices as a super-fast replacement for silicon transistors.
tip: “deficiency”（缺陷）指阻碍石墨烯应用的技术短板。

title: The substance is so _______ that it has even been touted as the future of condoms.
tip: “versatile”（多功能的）体现石墨烯用途广泛。

title: It is also almost _______, impermeable to gas, and its properties are easily alterable.
tip: 石墨烯“transparent”（透明）是其重要物理特性之一。

title: If they overcome that then it will be a big ________.
tip: “breakthrough”（突破）指克服技术障碍后的重大进展。

title: It could be used to create ultra-light components for, say, the aviation industry, _______ reducing the weight of aircraft efficiency without compromising strength or integrity.
tip: “dramatically reducing”（显著降低）符合航空减重效果描述。

title: Its flexibility means that it could _______ be used for flexible or wearable devices.
tip: “potentially”（潜在地）表示未来应用可能性。

title: With graphene, they _______ the beginnings of a material that could change the world.
tip: “sparked the beginnings”意为“点燃了开端”，比喻开创性。

title: Tenants and their advisors increasingly expect smart building features and some municipalities now have new _______ requiring public disclosure of facility energy efficiency.
tip: “ordinances”指地方法规，符合市政强制披露能效的语境。

title: The Empire State Building, for example, exceeded projected energy savings for the second _______ year following an extensive phased retrofit begun in 2009.
tip: “consecutive year”（连续第二年）符合时间顺序描述。

title: Using data generated by building automation systems, a smart-building management system can _______ minute changes in fan speed, air temperatures or energy consumption.
tip: “detect”意为“检测”，符合系统感知微小变化的功能。

title: Since smart buildings involve computer-controlled systems, owners and investors often _______ that operation requires a small army of computer programmers.
tip: “assume”（假设）体现常见误解，符合上下文逻辑。

title: The resulting savings, according to two major corporate energy management studies, have become increasingly _______ for a building to remain financially competitive in the marketplace.
tip: “essential”（必不可少的）强调节能对市场竞争力的关键性。

title: Cloud computing is another advance that makes smart building management systems financially _______ to a degree not previously possible.
tip: “feasible”（可行的）表示云计算使系统在经济上可实现。

title: In large buildings with _______ building automation systems, relatively inexpensive devices can be connected to the building control panel to enable a smart building management system to extract and analyze real-time equipment data.
tip: “centralized systems”（集中式系统）是楼宇自动化常见架构。

title: The internet and significant price reductions on IT _______ such as wireless sensors have made smart-building technologies much more affordable.
tip: “IT components”（IT组件）如无线传感器，符合技术语境。

title: The technology to enable this competitive _______ is already at hand.
tip: “competitive edge”（竞争优势）是固定搭配。

title: For each pixel, the program calculates the composition of the material ______ to it.
tip: “adjacent to”意为“邻近”，指与像素相邻的材料组成。
